title: Man arrested after missing 10-year-old found in his Rotterdam home following Amber Alert
title_zh: 一名男子因失踪10岁男童在鹿特丹家中被找到而被捕，此前警方发布了安珀警报。
description: Police in Rotterdam arrested a man after a missing 10-year-old girl, who likely spent the night at his home, was found early Sunday inside the residence on the Blekerslaan in Rotterdam-Feijenoord,
description_zh: 鹿特丹警方逮捕了一名男子，此前一名失踪的10岁女孩于周日清晨在鹿特丹-费耶诺德区布莱克斯兰街的一处住宅内被找到，女孩很可能在该男子家中过夜。

title: Code amber for Sunday night, one man killed falling through ice
title_zh: 周日晚间发布琥珀色警报，一名男子坠入冰窟身亡
description: The KNMI weather bureau has issued a code amber alarm for almost the entire country on Sunday night, saying snow...
description_zh: 荷兰皇家气象研究所（KNMI）周日晚间对全国几乎全境发布了琥珀色警报，称将有降雪……

title: Video: Dozens search Steenwijk overnight for boy, 8, who wandered off in subzero weather
title_zh: 视频：数十人在斯滕韦克连夜搜寻走失的8岁男孩，该男孩在零下严寒天气中走失
description: More than 100 volunteers joined police and emergency services overnight in a major search for an 8-year-old boy reported missing in Steenwijk.
description_zh: 超过 100 名志愿者连夜加入警方和紧急救援部门，在斯滕韦克展开大规模搜寻，寻找一名失踪的 8 岁男孩。

title: KNMI issues code orange for ice across most of the Netherlands overnight
title_zh: 荷兰皇家气象研究所（KNMI）发布橙色冰情预警，预计荷兰大部分地区一夜之间将出现冰情。
description: The Royal Netherlands Meteorological Institute (KNMI)issuedan orange alert for icy conditions and slick surfaces across
description_zh: 荷兰皇家气象研究所（KNMI）针对全国各地的冰雪路面和湿滑路面发布了橙色预警。

title: Video: Ten homes evacuated after warehouse fire in The Hague
title_zh: 视频：海牙仓库发生火灾，十户居民被疏散
description: A large fire broke out at a storage warehouse on Van Ostadestraat in the Schilderswijk neighborhood of The Hague early Sunday, forcing the evacuation of about ten nearby homes.
description_zh: 周日清晨，海牙 Schilderswijk 区 Van Ostadestraat 街的一处仓库发生大火，迫使附近约 10 户居民撤离。

title: Natural ice opens for skating across multiple Dutch towns, including Doorn, Warmond
title_zh: 荷兰多个城镇，包括多恩和瓦尔蒙德，都开放了天然冰场供游客滑冰。
description: Skaters in several Dutch towns are able to enjoy natural ice on Sunday morning, as multiple outdoor rinks reported that conditions were suitable for skating.
description_zh: 周日上午，荷兰多个城镇的滑冰爱好者可以享受天然冰面带来的乐趣，因为多家户外滑冰场报告称，冰面状况适合滑冰。

title: Amber Alert issued for 10-year-old Wendy missing in Rotterdam; Police fear abduction
title_zh: 鹿特丹发布安珀警报，寻找失踪的10岁女孩温迪；警方担心她遭到绑架
description: The Rotterdam police issued an Amber Alert for 10-year-old Wendy on Saturday after she failed to reach her parents’ shop on her usual route, authorities said.
description_zh: 鹿特丹警方周六发布了针对10岁女孩温迪的安珀警报，因为她没有像往常一样按路线到达父母的商店。

title: Netherlands shivers overnight: -11.5 near Groningen, Drenthe felt like -15
title_zh: 荷兰一夜寒风凛冽：格罗宁根附近气温低至零下11.5度，德伦特省体感温度低至零下15度。
description: Severe cold held much of the Netherlands in its grip Sunday night when the temperatures dropped to minus 11.5 degrees in some parts of the country, with bitter wind chills and hazardous conditions
description_zh: 周日晚间，荷兰大部分地区遭遇严寒天气，部分地区气温骤降至零下11.5摄氏度，伴有刺骨的寒风和危险的天气状况。

title: Fewer flight cancellations at Schiphol, but trains and roads hit by snow and ice
title_zh: 史基浦机场航班取消数量减少，但火车和公路交通受冰雪影响。
description: Winter weather continued to affect travel across the Netherlands on Sunday, though disruptions were far fewer than earlier in the week.
description_zh: 周日，冬季天气继续影响荷兰各地的交通，但交通中断情况远少于本周早些时候。

title: Heating companies face much higher demand amid severe cold
title_zh: 严寒天气下，供暖公司面临更高的需求。
description: Heating companies across the Netherlands are facing sustained high demand as severe cold grips the country, with older and poorly maintained boilers sometimes failing under the strain.
description_zh: 由于严寒天气席卷荷兰，全国各地的供暖公司都面临着持续的高需求，老旧且维护不善的锅炉有时会在这种压力下发生故障。

title: Netherlands records 1,525 explosive attacks in 2025, little change from last year
title_zh: 荷兰预计2025年将发生1525起爆炸袭击事件，与去年相比变化不大。
description: The Netherlands continues to experience frequent explosions targeting homes, businesses, and vehicles, according to police figures, with little overall decline in 2025.
description_zh: 根据警方数据，荷兰持续发生针对住宅、商铺和车辆的频繁爆炸事件，预计到 2025 年总体上不会有太大下降。

title: Minister says all the flight cancellations cost KLM and Schiphol reputation and money
title_zh: 部长表示，所有航班取消都会损害荷航和史基浦机场的声誉和经济利益。
description: KLM and its home base at Schiphol Airport suffered significant reputational damage this week after
description_zh: 本周，荷兰皇家航空公司及其位于史基浦机场的总部遭受了严重的声誉损失。

title: CNV labor union: Over 40% of Dutch workers feel unsafe commuting during snowstorms
title_zh: CNV工会：超过40%的荷兰工人认为暴风雪期间通勤不安全
description: More than four in 10 workers say they feel unsafe commuting to and from work during this week of heavy snow and icy conditions, and more than one in five report that their employer shows no underst
description_zh: 超过十分之四的工人表示，在本周大雪和冰冻路面的情况下，他们上下班途中感到不安全；超过五分之一的工人表示，他们的雇主对此毫无理解。

title: Femicide drops, but experts warn danger remains for women leaving partners
title_zh: 杀害女性案件有所下降，但专家警告称，离开伴侣的女性仍然面临危险。
description: The number of women killed in the Netherlands dropped last year, though experts caution it is too early to claim a broader decline in violence against women.
description_zh: 虽然荷兰去年被杀害的女性人数有所下降，但专家警告说，现在就断言针对女性的暴力行为总体上有所减少还为时过早。

title: Man chases, beats 12-year-old after boy throws snowball in Wassenaar
title_zh: 在瓦瑟纳尔，一名男子追赶并殴打了一名12岁男孩，起因是男孩扔了一个雪球。
description: A 12-year-old boy was assaulted Tuesday morning at a bicycle tunnel in Wassenaar.
description_zh: 周二上午，一名 12 岁男孩在瓦瑟纳尔的一个自行车隧道内遭到袭击。

title: Dutch professional soccer matches to proceed despite freezing weather
title_zh: 尽管天气严寒，荷兰职业足球比赛仍将继续进行。
description: Dutch professional soccer is set to resume as scheduled on Saturday despite freezing temperatures and winter weather that forced the
description_zh: 尽管气温骤降，冬季天气恶劣，荷兰职业足球联赛仍将于周六按计划恢复进行。

title: Nxt Museum in Amsterdam-Noord reopens Saturday after securing major subsidy
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹北部的Nxt博物馆在获得巨额补贴后于周六重新开放。
description: Nxt Museum in Amsterdam-Noord, which
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹努德 (Amsterdam-Noord) 的 Nxt 博物馆

title: Video: Asylum seeker jumps into icy canal to rescue woman from sinking car in Eindhoven
title_zh: 视频：在埃因霍温，一名寻求庇护者跳入冰冷的运河，从一辆正在下沉的汽车中救出一名女子
description: On a cold Friday morning in Eindhoven, with temperatures hovering around freezing, a 34-year-old asylum seeker of Eastern European origin jumped into a canal to save a woman whose car had plunged i
description_zh: 在埃因霍温一个寒冷的周五早晨，气温徘徊在冰点附近，一名34岁的东欧裔寻求庇护者跳入运河，救起了一名汽车坠入水中的女子。

title: Dutch ice experts warn natural ice remains unsafe despite weekend freeze
title_zh: 荷兰冰专家警告称，尽管周末气温有所下降，但天然冰仍然不安全。
description: With temperatures plunging across the Netherlands this weekend, some residents are eyeing local lakes, hoping they might finally offer an ice skating opportunity this winter.
description_zh: 本周末荷兰气温骤降，一些居民开始关注当地的湖泊，希望今年冬天能有机会滑冰。

title: Prayer healer who claims to cure cancer, homosexuality, and autism arrested in Tilburg
title_zh: 一名声称能治愈癌症、同性恋和自闭症的祈祷治疗师在蒂尔堡被捕
description: Controversial prayer healer Tom de Wal was arrested Friday evening in Tilburg after holding a prohibited healing service at the Praise Church.
description_zh: 备受争议的祈祷治疗师汤姆·德·瓦尔（Tom de Wal）周五晚在蒂尔堡的赞美教堂举行了一场被禁止的治疗仪式后被捕。

title: Bitter cold, snow, ice to grip Noord‑Nederland and spread across country this weekend
title_zh: 本周末，荷兰北部将遭遇严寒、降雪和冰冻天气，并蔓延至全国。
description: Northern Netherlands will continue to face icy conditions Saturday afternoon, with temperatures remaining below freezing and travel disruptions persisting across the region, weeronline
description_zh: 荷兰北部地区周六下午仍将面临冰冻天气，气温将持续低于冰点，该地区交通中断的情况也将持续，weeronline报道。

title: At least five Dutch girls attempted suicide after joining sadistic online chat groups
title_zh: 至少五名荷兰女孩在加入虐待狂网络聊天群后企图自杀
description: In the past five years, at least five young Dutch girls have attempted suicide after participating in what
description_zh: 过去五年里，至少有五名荷兰年轻女孩在参与某种活动后试图自杀。

title: GL-PvdA and JA21 criticize Dutch D66-CDA-VVD rare minority cabinet
title_zh: GL-PvdA 和 JA21 批评荷兰 D66-CDA-VVD 罕见的少数派内阁
description: Leaders of D66, CDA, and VVDannounced on Fridaythey will form a minority cabinet, leaving
description_zh: D66、CDA 和 VVD 的领导人周五宣布，他们将组建少数派内阁，退出执政联盟。

title: Video: Police raid cocaine recovery facility in Sprang-Capelle
title_zh: 视频：警方突袭斯普朗-卡佩勒的可卡因回收设施
description: Dutch police discovered an active facility for recovering cocaine from contaminated materials late Friday night in a house on Raadhuisstraat, Tilburg police reported on
description_zh: 荷兰警方周五深夜在蒂尔堡市拉德胡伊斯街的一处房屋内发现了一个正在运作的从受污染材料中提炼可卡因的设施，蒂尔堡警方报告称。

title: Sub zero temperatures all day as Dutch big freeze continues
title_zh: 荷兰寒潮持续，全天气温低于零度。
description: Snow will continue to fall in the south and south-east of the Netherlands on Saturday, but elsewhere it will be...
description_zh: 周六，荷兰南部和东南部地区将继续下雪，但其他地区……

title: Overnight snow disrupts train travel, but Schiphol departures largely resume
title_zh: 夜间降雪影响了火车出行，但史基浦机场的航班基本恢复正常。
description: Large parts of the Netherlands were blanketed in snow overnight, causing slippery streets and travel delays, though the number of cancelled departing flights at Amsterdam’s Schiphol Airport remaine
description_zh: 荷兰大部分地区一夜之间被大雪覆盖，导致街道湿滑，交通延误，但阿姆斯特丹史基浦机场取消的离港航班数量仍然很少。

title: Overnight snowfall covers large parts of Netherlands, with up to 7 cm in Limburg Hills
title_zh: 荷兰大部分地区一夜之间普降大雪，林堡丘陵地区积雪达7厘米。
description: Large parts of the Netherlands were covered in fresh snow overnight after widespread snowfall brought several centimeters.
description_zh: 一夜之间，荷兰大部分地区被厚厚的积雪覆盖，大范围降雪带来了数厘米的积雪。

title: Highly educated Dutch women misjudge chances of living to 90
title_zh: 受过高等教育的荷兰女性低估了自己活到90岁的几率
description: Many Dutch adults underestimate how long they are likely to live, with highly educated women showing the largest gap, according to research by Tilburg University professor Harry van Dalen and Groni
description_zh: 蒂尔堡大学教授哈里·范·达伦和格罗尼的研究表明，许多荷兰成年人低估了自己的预期寿命，其中受过高等教育的女性的低估程度最大。

title: Why snow causes so many problems at Schiphol: De-icing shortages and frozen wings
title_zh: 为什么雪在史基浦机场造成这么多问题：除冰剂短缺和机翼冻裂
description: Schiphol is facingmajor delaysdue to winter weather, but why can’t airplanes simpl
description_zh: 史基浦机场因冬季天气面临严重延误，但为什么飞机不能简化流程呢？

title: New Dutch energy contract rules leave consumers in the dark on price changes
title_zh: 荷兰新的能源合同规则让消费者对价格变化毫不知情。
description: The Consumentenbond and Vereniging Eigen Huis (VEH)saidThursday tha
description_zh: Consumentenbond 和 Vereniging Eigen Huis (VEH) 周四表示

title: Almost 40% of former Blokker stores still empty a year after bankruptcy
title_zh: Blokker破产一年后，近40%的前门店仍然空置。
description: Almost 40 percent of the stores that were owned by retail chain Blokker prior to their bankruptcy are still empty a year later.
description_zh: 零售连锁店 Blokker 破产前拥有的近 40% 的店铺，一年后仍然空置。

title: Dutch road authority preparing for -20°C wind chill, snow, and fog this weekend
title_zh: 荷兰道路管理部门正为本周末可能出现的零下20摄氏度的风寒、降雪和大雾天气做准备
description: The protocol for severe cold weather along Dutch roads will be in place from 6 p.m. on Saturday.
description_zh: 荷兰道路严寒天气应对方案将于周六下午6点开始实施。

title: Booker Prize nominee Astrid Roemer dead at age 78
title_zh: 布克奖提名作家阿斯特丽德·罗默去世，享年78岁。
description: Celebrated Dutch-Surinamese author Astrid Roemer died on Thursday, publishing company Prometheus announced on social media. The 78-year-old passed away at her residence in Paramaribo, Suriname.
description_zh: 著名荷兰裔苏里南作家阿斯特丽德·罗默于周四去世，出版公司普罗米修斯在社交媒体上发布了这一消息。这位78岁的作家在苏里南帕拉马里博的家中安详离世。

title: Schiphol to face "high delays" over snow removal & de-icing, but KLM hopeful
title_zh: 史基浦机场将因除雪除冰工作面临“严重延误”，但荷航仍抱有希望。
description: Persistentsnowfall and strong winds from Storm Gorettiare expected to cause pr
description_zh: 预计戈雷蒂风暴带来的持续降雪和强风将导致……

title: Video: Many northern roads closed over snow, strong wind; Homeless shelters overcrowded
title_zh: 视频：北部多条道路因大雪和强风封闭；无家可归者收容所人满为患。
description: Several provincial roads in the north of the Netherlands were closed by the end of Friday afternoon due to persistent snow and strong winds.
description_zh: 由于持续降雪和大风，荷兰北部几条省级公路在周五下午结束时被封闭。

title: D66, CDA, VVD will form new Cabinet with minority support in Parliament
title_zh: D66、CDA和VVD将在议会中获得少数支持，组建新内阁。
description: Political parties D66, CDA, and VVD will form a coalition government even though the three parties do not carry a majority of support in neither the Tweede Kamer, the lower house of Parliament, nor
description_zh: 尽管民主66党、基督教民主联盟党和自由民主党在议会下院（Tweede Kamer）和上院（VVD）均未获得多数席位，但它们仍将组成联合政府。

title: D66, CDA and VVD agree to form a minority Dutch cabinet
title_zh: D66、CDA 和 VVD 同意组建少数派荷兰内阁
description: The three parties involved in talks on putting together a new Dutch government have opted to form a minority administration...
description_zh: 参与组建荷兰新政府谈判的三方已决定组建少数派政府……

title: Road closures in north, more snow and a very cold weekend ahead
title_zh: 北部地区道路封闭，更多降雪，预计周末将非常寒冷
description: A number of roads were closed in Groningen province on Friday afternoon because of heavy snow and drifting. The KNMI...
description_zh: 周五下午，由于大雪和积雪，格罗宁根省多条道路封闭。荷兰皇家气象研究所（KNMI）……

title: Little change in total explosive attacks on property last year
title_zh: 去年针对财产的爆炸袭击总数变化不大
description: The number of explosives attacks on private homes and commercial property remained almost unchanged last year, according to new police...
description_zh: 根据警方最新数据，去年针对私人住宅和商业场所的爆炸袭击数量几乎没有变化……

title: Eindhoven hotel drops event by faith healer who "cures" homosexuality, cancer & autism
title_zh: 埃因霍温一家酒店取消了由一位声称能“治愈”同性恋、癌症和自闭症的信仰治疗师举办的活动。
description: The Eindhoven hotel set to host controversial Christian faith healer Tom de Wal has cancelled the event amid ongoing concerns about the evangelist's claims he can "cure" people of medical condition
description_zh: 原定在埃因霍温举办的基督教信仰治疗师汤姆·德·瓦尔（Tom de Wal）的活动已被取消，原因是人们对这位传教士声称自己可以“治愈”人们的疾病持续感到担忧。

title: National train service scaled back all weekend due to snow and ice
title_zh: 由于冰雪天气，全国列车服务整个周末都缩减了规模。
description: Trains in the Netherlands will continue to run on a reduced timetable all weekend, with freezing temperatures predicted Friday through Sunday during both daytime and overnight hours, said ProRail.
description_zh: 荷兰铁路公司ProRail表示，由于预计周五至周日白天和夜间气温都将降至冰点以下，荷兰的列车将在整个周末继续按缩减后的时刻表运行。

title: Coolblue will sell bicycle helmets, CEO says after losing teeth in bike crash
title_zh: Coolblue首席执行官在自行车事故中失去牙齿后表示，公司将继续销售自行车头盔。
description: Electronics chain Coolblue will start selling bicycle helmets, CEO Pieter Zwart announced onLinkedIn.
description_zh: 首席执行官 Pieter Zwart 在 LinkedIn 上宣布，电子连锁店 Coolblue 将开始销售自行车头盔。

title: Podcast: The Cancelled Planes, Trains and Automobiles Editions
title_zh: 播客：《取消的飞机、火车和汽车特辑》
description: Want to support the DutchNews podcast and keep up our stocks of stroopwafels and orange tompouces? Click here to become...
description_zh: 想支持 DutchNews 播客，并让我们的焦糖华夫饼和橙味甜甜圈库存充足吗？点击此处成为……

title: Tanning salon owner subjected to years of violence wants more aid for entrepreneurs
title_zh: 长期遭受暴力侵害的日光浴沙龙老板希望为创业者提供更多援助
description: Pinar Günes, owner of a tanning salon in Wijchen, Gelderland, has been subject to attacks on her business for three years, ranging from threats to shootings to explosions.
description_zh: 在海尔德兰省维亨市拥有一家日光浴沙龙的皮纳尔·居内斯，三年来一直遭受针对其生意的袭击，从威胁到枪击再到爆炸。

title: KLM warns of more "uncertainty" at Schiphol; Winter cancellations hit 300,000 people
title_zh: 荷航警告称阿姆斯特丹史基浦机场存在更多“不确定性”；冬季航班取消影响30万人。
description: Dutch airline KLM issued a new warning to its customers on Friday afternoon, saying that it was difficult to predict how
description_zh: 荷兰皇家航空公司（KLM）周五下午向其客户发出新的警告，称难以预测疫情发展情况。

title: Hoarding at Friesland supermarkets: Higher sales than Christmas
title_zh: 弗里斯兰超市出现囤货现象：销量高于圣诞节
description: Supermarkets in Friesland did big business on Thursday ahead of acode ora
description_zh: 周四，弗里斯兰省的超市生意兴隆，因为正值 acode ora 节前夕。

title: Icy cold and dry weekend ahead; Rain, higher temps next week
title_zh: 周末天气寒冷干燥；下周有雨，气温升高。
description: After an extremely snowy week, the Netherlands will see a completely different side of winter this weekend.
description_zh: 经历了一周的暴雪之后，荷兰本周末将迎来截然不同的冬季景象。

title: Bad news for the Elfstedentocht: “snow is the enemy of ice”
title_zh: 对埃尔夫斯泰登托赫特来说，这是个坏消息：“雪是冰的敌人”。
description: Ice skating lovers hoping for higher chances of an Elfstedentocht ice skating tour between 11 Frisian cities this year will...
description_zh: 今年，希望弗里斯兰11座城市之间举办的“十一城之旅”（Elfstedentocht）滑冰活动的滑冰爱好者们将会有更大的机会……

title: Triodos is latest Dutch bank to cut jobs, 250 set to go by 2028
title_zh: Triodos是最新一家宣布裁员的荷兰银行，计划到2028年裁员250人。
description: Triodos Bank is set to cut between 250 and 270 jobs to rein in costs, making it the latest Dutch...
description_zh: 为控制成本，Triodos银行计划裁员250至270人，成为最新一家采取裁员措施的荷兰银行。

title: Couple denies using ChatGPT for wedding ceremony after court annuls marriage
title_zh: 法院宣布婚姻无效后，这对夫妇否认在婚礼仪式上使用 ChatGPT。
description: The man and woman who found out on Wednesday that theirmarriage had been declared inval
description_zh: 这对男女周三得知他们的婚姻被宣布无效。

title: The Netherlands won’t condemn US over Venezuela action
title_zh: 荷兰不会就美国对委内瑞拉采取的行动谴责美国。
description: The Dutch government will not officially condemn the United States for breaking international law following the abduction of Venezuelan president...
description_zh: 荷兰政府不会就美国绑架委内瑞拉总统一事正式谴责美国违反国际法……

title: Spending in cafes goes up, but financial problems remain
title_zh: 咖啡馆消费增加，但财务问题依然存在。
description: Rising purchasing power is prompting people to spend more in cafés and restaurants but more owners say they face financial...
description_zh: 购买力的提升促使人们在咖啡馆和餐馆增加消费，但越来越多的业主表示他们面临财务困境……

title: Unions concerned about secret sale of Limburg petrochemical firm Sabic
title_zh: 工会担忧林堡石化公司沙特基础工业公司（SABIC）被秘密出售
description: Trade unions are very concerned about the sale of the Limburg petrochemical firm Sabic to a German investment company.
description_zh: 工会非常关注将林堡石化公司沙特基础工业公司出售给一家德国投资公司一事。

title: Snow is a problem on flat roofs, causing collapses and closures
title_zh: 积雪对平屋顶来说是个问题，会导致屋顶坍塌和封闭。
description: A series of roof collapses and building closures across the Netherlands has raised fears about the impact of prolonged snowfall...
description_zh: 荷兰各地发生的一系列屋顶坍塌和建筑物关闭事件引发了人们对持续降雪影响的担忧……

title: Code amber in the north with a very cold weekend ahead
title_zh: 北部地区发布琥珀色预警，预计周末将非常寒冷。
description: The KNMI weather bureau issued a code amber weather warning for the northern provinces of Friesland, Drenthe and Groningen, as...
description_zh: 荷兰皇家气象研究所（KNMI）对北部省份弗里斯兰省、德伦特省和格罗宁根省发布了琥珀色天气预警，因为……

title: Roof of 30,000 m2 building collapses under snow on Tilburg industrial estate
title_zh: 蒂尔堡工业园区一栋3万平方米建筑的屋顶被积雪压塌
description: The roof of a business on an industrial estate in Tilburg collapsed on Thursday evening, likely due to the snow piled on top of it.
description_zh: 周四晚上，蒂尔堡工业园区内一家企业的屋顶坍塌，很可能是由于屋顶上堆积的积雪造成的。

title: More flights scrapped at Schiphol as bosses pledge improvements
title_zh: 史基浦机场取消更多航班，管理层承诺改进
description: Around 80 flights were cancelled at Schiphol on Friday as snow and freezing conditions continued to disrupt air traffic. The...
description_zh: 周五，由于降雪和冰冻天气持续影响空中交通，史基浦机场约有 80 个航班被取消。

title: KLM CEO apologizes for bad communication in snow chaos; Dozens of flights canceled today
title_zh: 荷航首席执行官就暴雪造成的混乱局面沟通不畅致歉；今日数十个航班取消
description: KLM should have communicated better with passengers who got stranded at Schiphol this week, Marjan Lintel, CEO of the Dutch airline, said on Pauw & De Wit on Thursday.
description_zh: 荷兰皇家航空公司首席执行官马里安·林特尔周四在 Pauw & De Wit 节目中表示，荷航应该更好地与本周滞留在史基浦机场的乘客沟通。

title: Over 50 Dutch holiday parks converted into residential neighborhoods in 10 years
title_zh: 十年间，超过50个荷兰度假公园被改造成住宅区
description: Over the past decade, 56 Dutch holiday parks have been declared unsuitable for tourism.
description_zh: 过去十年间，荷兰有 56 个度假公园被宣布不适合旅游。

title: Minors arrested over false bomb threats at schools, asylum center in Groningen, Drenthe
title_zh: 德伦特省格罗宁根市，未成年人因在学校和难民营发出虚假炸弹威胁而被捕。
description: Dutch police arrested two minors Thursday in connection with false bomb threats targeting five schools and a COA asylum accommodation in Groningen and Drenthe earlier that day.
description_zh: 周四，荷兰警方逮捕了两名未成年人，他们涉嫌当天早些时候对格罗宁根和德伦特的五所学校和一处 COA 庇护所发出虚假炸弹威胁。

title: Code Orange: Heavy snowfall in the northern provinces; Road users urged to stay home
title_zh: 橙色预警：北部省份普降大雪；敦促道路使用者留在家中
description: Up to 15 centimeters of snow will fall in the northern provinces on Friday.
description_zh: 周五，北部各省将迎来高达15厘米的降雪。

title: Unusually high number of children contracting chickenpox: 22 per 100,000 aged 5–14
title_zh: 5至14岁儿童中，水痘感染率异常高：每10万名儿童中有22人感染。
description: Dutch doctors are reporting an unusually high number of chickenpox cases among children this winter, according to data from the health institute Nivel.
description_zh: 根据荷兰卫生研究所Nivel的数据，荷兰医生报告称，今年冬天儿童水痘病例数量异常高。

title: Video: Rotterdam Ferro Dome evacuated in roof collapse; Snow to disrupt bus services
title_zh: 视频：鹿特丹铁穹体育馆屋顶坍塌，人员疏散；降雪将影响公交服务
description: A partial roof collapse prompted authorities to evacuate the Ferro Dome in Rotterdam amid fears of further structural failure.
description_zh: 由于担心结构进一步损坏，鹿特丹铁穹体育馆部分屋顶坍塌，当局随即疏散了馆内人员。

title: Groningen schools and universities to close Friday amid code orange winter storm
title_zh: 格罗宁根的学校和大学周五因橙色预警冬季风暴而关闭
description: Schools and universities across Groningen are closing on Friday due tocode orangewea
description_zh: 由于橙色天气预警，格罗宁根各地的学校和大学将于周五关闭。

title: TopzorgGroep acquires FysioHolland, becomes Netherlands’ largest physiotherapy provider
title_zh: TopzorgGroep 收购 FysioHolland，成为荷兰最大的理疗服务提供商
description: TopzorgGroep has acquired FysioHolland, a chain of about 100 physiotherapy practices.
description_zh: TopzorgGroep 收购了 FysioHolland，这是一个拥有约 100 家理疗诊所的连锁机构。

title: Mass claim for lost footballers‘ wages “will make system fairer“
title_zh: 球员集体要求赔偿损失工资“将使制度更加公平”
description: A mass claim being brought in the Dutch courts against football’s world governing body FIFA is set to trigger the...
description_zh: 荷兰法院受理的一起针对足球世界管理机构国际足联的大规模诉讼，预计将引发……

title: Dozens of flights canceled at Schiphol Friday ahead of winter storm Goretti
title_zh: 受冬季风暴戈雷蒂的影响，史基浦机场周五数十个航班被取消。
description: Schiphol Airport is facing major disruptions asStorm Gorettimoves across E
description_zh: 由于戈雷蒂风暴横扫东部地区，史基浦机场面临严重混乱。

title: Nearly 950 Syrians return to Syria in 2025 amid Dutch financial support
title_zh: 在荷兰的财政支持下，近950名叙利亚人将于2025年返回叙利亚。
description: Nearly 950 Syrians voluntarily returned to Syria in 2025, aided by Dutch government financial support programs and a changing situation in their homeland, the Immigration and Return Service of the
description_zh: 据荷兰移民和返乡服务局称，在荷兰政府财政支持计划和叙利亚国内局势变化的帮助下，近950名叙利亚人在2025年自愿返回叙利亚。

title: 25-year-old woman dies in Amsterdam collision; Bike trapped under truck, witnesses say
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹发生车祸，一名25岁女子死亡；目击者称，一辆自行车被压在卡车下。
description: A 25-year-old woman from Amsterdam was killed Thursday morning after her bike collided with a truck at a major intersection in Amsterdam-Zuid,
description_zh: 周四上午，一名来自阿姆斯特丹的25岁女子在阿姆斯特丹南区的一个主要十字路口骑自行车时与一辆卡车相撞身亡。

title: Up to 15cm of snow, -10°C wind chill Friday: Storm Goretti forces train timetable cuts
title_zh: 周五降雪量达15厘米，体感温度零下10摄氏度：戈雷蒂风暴迫使列车时刻表调整
description: The Netherlands faces its fifth snowy day this week as hazardous winter conditions sweep across the northern provinces.
description_zh: 荷兰本周将迎来第五场降雪，危险的冬季天气席卷北部各省。

title: Two teens arrested in fatal snowball brawl that left 60-year-old man dead in Schiedam
title_zh: 在斯希丹，两名青少年因一场致命的雪仗斗殴被捕，该斗殴导致一名60岁男子死亡。
description: Police in Schiedam on Thursday arrested two boys, ages 16 and 17, in connection with the death of a 60-year-old man near metro station Schiedam Nieuwland, days after two earlier suspects were wrong
description_zh: 周四，斯希丹警方逮捕了两名分别为16岁和17岁的男孩，他们涉嫌与一名60岁男子在斯希丹新地地铁站附近死亡一案有关。此前，两名嫌疑人被错误地认定为凶手。

title: Wolf with tracker swims over rivers, travels 30 kilometres a day
title_zh: 追踪者带着狼游过河流，一天行进30公里
description: Five animals have so far been fitted with tracking collars in a study examining how wolves, prey animals and people...
description_zh: 目前已有五只动物被佩戴了追踪项圈，这项研究旨在探究狼、猎物动物和人类之间的关系……

title: Iconic Dom tower clock loses time as minute hand falls down
title_zh: 标志性的大教堂塔钟走时不准，分针掉落
description: One of the massive clock hands on Utrecht’s Dom tower fell off on Wednesday, causing no injuries but killing time...
description_zh: 周三，乌得勒支大教堂塔楼上的一根巨大的钟指针脱落，虽然没有造成人员伤亡，但却造成了时间上的损失……

title: Code amber in the north as strong winds, more snow move in
title_zh: 北部地区发布琥珀色预警，强风和更多降雪正在逼近
description: The KNMI weather bureau has issued a code amber weather warning for the  northern provinces of Friesland, Groningen and Drenthe...
description_zh: 荷兰皇家气象研究所（KNMI）已对弗里斯兰省、格罗宁根省和德伦特省等北部省份发布了琥珀色天气预警……

title: Japanese bank MUFG to focus EU banking in Amsterdam
title_zh: 日本三菱日联银行将把业务重心放在阿姆斯特丹的欧盟银行业务上
description: Japan’s largest bank Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group (MUFG) is concentrating its European Union activities in Amsterdam, moving EU capital to...
description_zh: 日本最大的银行三菱日联金融集团（MUFG）正将其欧盟业务集中到阿姆斯特丹，并将欧盟资本转移到那里……

title: IKEA stores in Utrecht, Groningen, Breda closed Thursday over snow on flat roofs
title_zh: 由于屋顶积雪，乌得勒支、格罗宁根和布雷达的宜家门店周四关闭。
description: The IKEA stores in Utrecht, Breda, and Groningen will remain closed on Thursday due to snow on the buildings’ flat roofs, a spokesperson confirmed to ANP.
description_zh: 一位发言人向荷兰通讯社（ANP）证实，由于建筑物平顶上积雪，乌得勒支、布雷达和格罗宁根的宜家门店将于周四继续关闭。

title: Restaurants offer discounts to lure customers out in winter weather
title_zh: 餐厅在冬季提供折扣以吸引顾客外出就餐
description: Anyone looking to dine out for cheaper would do best to go this week, as winter weather has prompted several restaurants across the Netherlands to offer discounts to customers,
description_zh: 想要外出就餐且预算有限的人最好在本周前往，因为冬季天气促使荷兰各地多家餐厅为顾客提供折扣。
